name: varoom
flavor_texts: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.
The steel section is Varoom’s actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.
text: Varoom is the Single-Cyl Pokémon. It is a steel and poison-type Pokémon. Abilities: overcoat, slow-start (hidden). Base stats — HP: 45, Attack: 70, Defense: 63, Sp. Atk: 30, Sp. Def: 45, Speed: 47. Evolution line: varoom → revavroom. Lore: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory. The steel section is Varoom’s actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.
